title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates!
